content.text:
[cron:ea289f91-c82f-452c-94b4-6abd6ce87f64 retry-jetton-monitor-build] 检查 Jetton Monitor GitHub Actions 构建状态。如果最新构建失败或未开始，重新触发 Windows 构建工作流。repo: hiyaScott/jetton-monitor
Current time: Monday, March 16th, 2026 — 2:18 PM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
用户要求我检查 Jetton Monitor 的 GitHub Actions 构建状态。如果最新构建失败或未开始，需要重新触发 Windows 构建工作流。

让我先检查 GitHub Actions 的状态。我需要使用 gh CLI 来检查工作流运行状态。

details.error:
To get started with GitHub CLI, please run:  gh auth login
Alternatively, populate the GH_TOKEN environment variable with a GitHub API authentication token.

Command exited with code 4

message.errorMessage: 429 {"error":{"type":"rate_limit_error","message":"The engine is currently overloaded, please try again later"},"type":"error"}
429 {"error":{"type":"rate_limit_error","message":"The engine is currently overloaded, please try again later"},"type":"error"}
429 {"error":{"type":"rate_limit_error","message":"The engine is currently overloaded, please try again later"},"type":"error"}

content.thinking:
需要设置 GH_TOKEN 环境变量来使用 gh CLI。让我检查一下是否有 token 可用，或者尝试其他方式。

我先查看是否有 GitHub token 配置在环境中。

arguments.command: cat ~/.config/gh/hosts.yml 2>/dev/null || echo "No gh hosts config found"

details.error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, access '/root/.openclaw/workspace/.env'

content.thinking: gh CLI 没有认证。让我尝试使用 curl 通过 GitHub API 直接检查工作流状态。我需要 GitHub token，让我看看是否有其他地方存储。

arguments.command: env | grep -i github || env | grep -i gh_token || echo "No GitHub token found in env"

content.text: No GitHub token found in env

details.aggregated: No GitHub token found in env

details.error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, access '/root/.openclaw/workspace/skills/github-automation/SKILL.md'

content.thinking:
看来 GitHub CLI 没有配置认证，环境中也没有 GitHub token。让我尝试直接读取 GitHub 上的公开信息，看工作流状态是否可以通过 API 访问。如果仓库是公开的，我可以查询工作流状态。

让我先尝试使用 curl 查询 GitHub API 获取工作流运行状态。

content.thinking:
好的，我看到了 GitHub API 的返回。最新构建的信息是：

- 工作流名称: "Windows Build"
- 运行编号: #3
- 状态: "completed" (已完成)
- 结论: "success" (成功)
- 触发方式: "workflow_dispatch"
- 创建时间: 2026-03-16T04:36:59Z
- 更新时间: 2026-03-16T04:47:45Z (耗时约11分钟)
- 提交消息: "fix: use direct rustup install instead of dtolnay/rust-action"

最新构建已经成功完成，所以不需要重新触发。让我获取更多信息来确认状态。

arguments.command: curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/hiyaScott/jetton-monitor/actions/runs?per_page=1" | jq -r '.workflow_runs[0] | {name, run_number, status, conclusion, created_at, updated_at, head_commit}' 2>/dev/null || echo "jq not available, parsing manually"
